milestoneTitle: Phase M9.7b — YouTube tile on every section head. The same glass YouTube button that sits top-right on Dashboard now appears on Learn, Projects, and Tools so each section-head has identical vertical footprint — the top-of-page spacing (nav-to-header and header-to-first-component) no longer shifts as you switch tabs. The id selector #youtube-open was generalized to a .youtube-open-btn class so multiple instances share styles, and the JS click handler switched from getElementById to a querySelectorAll loop. That top-right slot is now reserved as a quick-action area for modal shortcuts that don't belong in the nav pill.
